headline: Better Payments Stock for the Long Haul: American Express or Visa?
summary: American Express is focused on a select customer base, while Visa aims to serve everyone, acting as a middleman.

headline: Mastercard's Opportunity In Cross-Border Payments Signals Path To Upside
summary: Mastercard (MA) stock outlook: Strong Buy at near 10-year low multiples. Cross-border payments represent a significant growth opportunity. See more.
